steps.title: Identify the appositive
steps.content: The phrase “a construction system known as ______” is an appositive that renames “These temporary supports.” As a nonrestrictive appositive, it must be set off by commas on both sides.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule
steps.content: Choice C places a comma before and after falsework, correctly punctuating the appositive. The other three either omit needed punctuation or use a semicolon or colon, which breaks the appositive structure. That matches choice C — C is correct.
